case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK (SOUTH VS. VALENTINO FAZZARI et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR INTEREST, COST AND ATTORNEY FEES; CALCULATION OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY FEES; CCP 1033 (B) (2) NOTICE; STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT; ASSIGNMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA), N.A.
